title: Kawhi Leonard returns to Raptors in reported Clippers trade
summary: NBA.com analyzes the ESPN-reported deal sending Kawhi Leonard back to Toronto for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick and a package of draft picks.

title: Zach Collins reportedly agrees to 2-year Bulls extension
summary: NBA.com cites ESPN reporting that Zach Collins will stay in Chicago on a two-year, $17 million extension through 2027-28.

title: Dean Wade reportedly agrees to 4-year deal with 76ers
summary: NBA.com cites ESPN and Associated Press reporting that Dean Wade is leaving Cleveland for a four-year, $39 million agreement with Philadelphia.

title: Emirates NBA Cup 2026 groups announced
summary: The NBA announced all six groups for the 2026 Emirates NBA Cup, with group play opening Oct. 30 and the championship set for Dec. 11 at Hinkle Fieldhouse.

title: Luke Kennard reportedly set to sign with Suns
summary: NBA.com cites ESPN reporting that Luke Kennard agreed to a two-year, $13 million deal with Phoenix, including a second-year player option.

title: Keon Ellis reportedly agrees to 2-year Nets deal
summary: NBA.com cites ESPN and The Athletic reporting that Keon Ellis is joining Brooklyn on a two-year, $18 million agreement with a mutual option.

title: Ousmane Dieng reportedly re-ups with Bucks
summary: NBA.com cites ESPN reporting that Ousmane Dieng agreed to a three-year, $17.5 million deal to remain with Milwaukee.

title: Tim Hardaway Jr. reportedly agrees to Heat deal
summary: NBA.com cites ESPN, NBA on Prime and The Athletic reporting that Tim Hardaway Jr. will join Miami on a one-year, $6.5 million deal.

title: Kristaps Porziņģis re-signs with Warriors
summary: Golden State announced Kristaps Porziņģis will remain with the Warriors on a two-year contract reportedly worth $40 million.

title: NBA sets 2026-27 salary cap at $164.961 million
summary: The NBA announced a $164.961 million salary cap, $200.428 million tax level and $221.686 million second apron for the 2026-27 season.

title: LeBron James reportedly tells Lakers he will play elsewhere
summary: NBA.com cites multiple reports, including ESPN, that Rich Paul told the Lakers LeBron James plans to continue his career with another team in 2026-27.

title: Trail Blazers add Ja Morant in trade with Grizzlies
summary: Portland acquired Ja Morant from Memphis in exchange for Jerami Grant and Kris Murray.

title: Hornets send Miles Bridges to Suns for Grayson Allen
summary: NBA.com cites multiple reports that Charlotte is sending Miles Bridges and picks to Phoenix for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a future first-round pick.

title: Heat reportedly acquire Giannis Antetokounmpo from Bucks
summary: NBA.com cites ESPN reporting that Miami is acquiring Giannis Antetokounmpo and Bobby Portis from Milwaukee for Tyler Herro, Kel'el Ware, Jaime Jaquez Jr., Kasparas Jakučionis and draft capital.
